title: Maizor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Maizor''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as one of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure's]] major competitors during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. After Maizor lost a confrontation with Jabba, the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] had the [[B'omarr Order/Legends|B'omarr Monks]]—who shared his [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|palace]] with him—place Maizor's brain into the nutrient jar of a [[B'omarr brain walker]], where he remained as a joke to the denizens of Jabba's Palace. It took over a year for Maizor to adjust enough to experience sensory input again. After the [[Death/Legends|death]] of Jabba, Maizor remained at the palace, learning solace from the Monks. Due to his hatred of the Hutts, he later told [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] of the [[Besadii/Legends|Besadii]] search for Jabba's old [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] records.

==Appearances==
*[[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']] {{1st}}
